title: Align Meshtastic app-compat sync ordering vectors with adapter
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-t2hn.15 review found test/vectors/meshtastic_app_compat.json lists stage-1 sync order as my_info, metadata, config, moduleConfig, channel, region_presets, while the active Zephyr adapter/test queues region_presets before config. What needs to be done: decide whether ordering must match current mobile app expectations or is intentionally flexible, then align the JSON vector, adapter, and ztests. Acceptance criteria: canonical vector and native_sim tests agree; ordering decision is recorded; mobile smoke script checks the selected ordering if apps are order-sensitive.
notes:
Ordering decision: align LICHEN stage-1 app-compat sync to Meshtastic firmware order, not the stale JSON order. Current Meshtastic firmware HEAD e64d20548c4313c92e0e641c41d388828e1d024a PhoneAPI sends STATE_SEND_METADATA, then STATE_SEND_REGION_PRESETS, then STATE_SEND_CHANNELS, then STATE_SEND_CONFIG. Generated mesh.pb.h also documents region_presets as sent during want_config right after metadata before the first channel. Selected order: my_info, metadata, region_presets, channel, config, moduleConfig, config_complete_id. Legacy/full-sync appends node_info before config_complete_id.
Implemented: changed Zephyr adapter enqueue_static_sync order to my_info -> metadata -> region_presets -> channel -> config -> moduleConfig; updated meshtastic_adapter ztest expected order and channel index; updated test/vectors/generate.py and regenerated test/vectors/meshtastic_app_compat.json; updated docs/meshtastic-compat-dev.md and docs/meshtastic-smoke-test.md to record/order-check the selected sequence.
Reviews: two independent review agents, Raman and Socrates, reported no findings. They checked adapter enqueue order, ztest indices, generated JSON/generator consistency, docs/smoke wording, and current Meshtastic firmware evidence. Raman additionally verified the existing vector baseline firmware SHA 2f97112987af311ca81dd70b83cbcf7236d6c119 has the same region_presets-after-metadata ordering.
Validation: local Python vector pytest after installing declared dev dependency jsonschema into .venv: PYTHONPATH=python/src .venv/bin/python -m pytest python/tests/test_vectors.py -q -> PASS 79/79 in 0.84s. Local stdlib generator drift check: meshtastic_app_compat generator match True, 14 vectors. EC2 i-05e27e074db786e22 clean worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-t2hn25-validate on EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58: direct native_sim command west build -b native_sim lichen/tests/meshtastic_adapter -d build/meshtastic_adapter-t2hn25 --pristine -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-t2hn25-validate/lichen && west build -d build/meshtastic_adapter-t2hn25 -t run -> PASS 55/55. Twister command west twister -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_codec -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_adapter -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_ble -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -T lichen/tests/app_interface -p native_sim --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-t2hn25 --extra-args ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-t2hn25-validate/lichen -> PASS 5/5 configs, 112/112 cases, 0 skipped, 0 failures/errors, 0 warnings in 103.10s. Note: bare local/EC2 Python pytest initially failed importing jsonschema; local .venv was brought into declared python[dev] parity for this validation.
close_reason: Completed: ordering decision recorded from current Meshtastic firmware evidence; adapter, ztests, canonical generator/JSON vectors, and smoke docs aligned; Python vector tests, native_sim, Twister, and two independent reviews passed.
